arts.ttl: Kris Boyd drops truth bombs to Philippe Clement about Celtic and Rangers gap
arts.sum: Yes, Celtic continue to beat Rangers, but the title isn’t just won in the derby games, you have to beat the rest also and Boyd delivered a dose of reality to the under-fire boss regarding that too. Kris Boyd slams Philippe Clement’s talk of financial gap between Celtic and Rangers

arts.ttl: Rangers vs Celtic LIVE as temperatures plummet ahead of fiery Ibrox showdown
arts.athr: reporters@dailyrecord.co.uk (Graeme Young, Ross Pilcher, Anthony Evans)
arts.sum: Philippe Clement has still to win a derby in Glasgow but is desperate to cut the 14-point gap Brendan Rodgers’ side boast

arts.ttl: Rangers vs Celtic Prediction: Team News, Predicted Lineups and Where To Watch
arts.sum: The 444th edition of the Old Firm derby takes place on Thursday, as Rangers host Celtic at Ibrox. Ahead of the match, we’ve made our score prediction, provided our predicted line-ups for bot...

arts.ttl: 'Completely unacceptable'... What's hurting Kenny Miller about Celtic ahead of Rangers game
arts.sum: Brendan Rodgers also oversaw another Glasgow Derby win earlier this season when Celtic hammered Rangers at Parkhead in the league at Celtic Park. Speaking to Gabby Agbonlahor ahead of the big match, the talkSPORT presenter told Miller that Rangers should be trying to salvage some pride against Celtic this afternoon.

arts.ttl: Celtic predicted XI against Rangers as Brendan Rodgers toys with midfield dilemma amid near full clean bill of health
arts.sum: The champions head to Ibrox looking to extend their lead at the Premiership summit to a remarkable 17 points

arts.ttl: Chris Sutton's not having Robbie Savage's title claim ahead of Rangers vs Celtic game
arts.sum: Whilst the league title is not over yet, it will be nigh on impossible for Rangers to catch Celtic if Rodgers records another Ibrox win, both teams’ run of Scottish Premiership fixtures after the Glasgow Derby will come into focus. With a 14-point advantage, Brendan Rodgers knows that whatever happens in the Glasgow Derby the Celtic boss will still be top of the league.

arts.ttl: Rangers pick your poison predicted XI as Clement mulls 4 out there options to rescue him vs Celtic
arts.sum: The Ibrox boss could be missing almost an entire defence as he faces major selection headache for derby

arts.ttl: Offer made for Celtic player – Optimism of agreement as negotiations advance with Brendan Rodgers’ side
arts.sum: Over the past few weeks, claims from Brazil have stated SC Internacional want to retain Celtic’s Alexandro Bernabei after signing him on loan from Brendan Rodgers’ side last year. Last month, Internacional vice-president José Olavo Bisol revealed the left-back wants to continue at the club and talks are progressing with Celtic. On Monday, we covered The post Offer made for Celtic player – Optimism of agreement as negotiations advance with Brendan Rodgers’ side appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.ttl: Jackie McNamara pinpoints Celtic key threats that can 'hurt' Rangers at Ibrox
arts.sum: Celtic take on Rangers at Ibrox today and will look to extend their Scottish Premiership lead to 17 points under Brendan Rodgers. Speaking on the Scottish Football Podcast, McNamara believes Celtic can ‘hurt’ Rangers in between their full-back and centre-back areas and has urged the Bhoys’ key men to put on another display to be proud of at Ibrox.

arts.ttl: Club Brugge, AZ Alkmaar and Rangers all interested in Croatian midfield starlet Leon Belcar (22)
arts.sum: Leon Belcar (22) has attracted admirers from across Europe after emerging as one of the Croatian top tier's most interesting prospects.
